'''Diptera maggots''' were used by [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Shaper caste|shapers]] to eat away decaying flesh following [[Escalation]] ceremonies.<ref name="sbs" />

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Star by Star]]'' {{1st}}
